title: Smoked Turkey Grain Salad
ingredients: 20 sun-dried tomatoes, soaked 10 minutes and drained
¾ cup diced sweet onion (Walla Walla or Vidalia preferred)
instructions:
Bring wild rice and broth to a boil. Cover and simmer until tender but firm. Transfer to a bowl and cool completely.
Add turkey, tomatoes, and onion. Toss avocado with lemon juice and add gently.
Whisk dressing ingredients together and add to salad. Toss gently and serve.
